summary: Game Tile Live MVPD Required Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND a Live MVPD Required game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a Live MVPD Required game tile
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team> at <home_team>, Not Entitled, MVPD Required. Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to hear more games. Move up to navigate to a new date."
